productDisplayName: French Connection Women Multi Colour Shopper Bag
description: Style NoteThis season's french connection line features bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe. Product DetailsOrange beige and blue bag with two short  handlesHas an open compartment with a mobile slotMaterial and CareTextileWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 37 cm Width: 44 cm Depth: 10 cm
